title: Scape and Run: Parasites Meteorite
description: Modifies the logic of how parasites emerge.
body:
![Visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3665ab5eeeda52e5145ec95f1d7b6ecd508232a0_0.webp)
This addon for [Scape and Run: Parasites](https://modrinth.com/mod/scapeandrunparasites) drastically changes the way infections originate in your world. Instead of the usual gradual emergence of parasites, infection is triggered by the fall of a meteorite. When the meteorite falls to the surface, it brings the infection to the surface, releasing dangerous parasites that quickly spread throughout the world.

### Mod Logic Overview:
- Meteorite spawn chance: Starting from the first day of gameplay, there is a 25% chance each day for a meteorite event to begin.
- Meteorite falls only at night before day 7: If a meteorite falls before day 7, it will occur exclusively during the night.
- On day 7, the chance reaches 100%, guaranteeing a meteorite will fall on that day.
- After the event ends, 3 meteorite crash sites appear in the world.
- No repeated meteorite events: After the first meteorite fall, no further meteorite events will occur.
### Available Commands:
- /srpmeteor help  - Displays a list of available commands and their descriptions.
- /srpmeteor event_set <id>  - Sets the event:
  - 0 - Zero event
  - 1 - Meteorite fall with config settings
  - 2 - Meteorite fall
- /srpmeteor event_reset  - Resets the current event. 
- /srpmeteor event_info  - Provides information about the current event.
- /srpmeteor getmeteorpos  - Get a list of all meteorite impact zone locations.
- /srpmeteor clearmeteorpos  - Clear the list of all meteorite impact zone locations.
- /srpmeteor dev <id>  - Developer tools:
  - 0 <worldId(integer)> <phase(integer)> <gain(booleand)> <loss(booleand)> - set phase.
  - 1 - check the phases of evolution in the available dimensions.
  - 2 - spawn big meteor (visual).
  - 3 <worldId(integer)> <x> <y> <z> - spawn big meteor (visual).
  - 4 <worldId(integer)> <x> <y> <z> - Create the structure of a meteorite impact zone.
  - 5 <worldId(integer)> <x> <y> <z> - Create the structure of a meteorite impact zone with a node.
  - 6 - meteorite shower (visual).
  - 7 <worldId(integer)> - meteorite shower (visual).
### Future Plans:
- Environmental Infection: After a meteorite crash, the area surrounding the impact site will become infected. 
- Parasite Colony Construction: Upon the meteorite’s impact, parasites will begin constructing a colony at the crash site. Over time, the colony will expand.
- Repeated meteorite fall on day 80+ with a node.

### The addon can be customized in the config.
